steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The student needs to accomplish two things: explain what “flauna” is AND provide an example of it. This dual requirement is the decisive clue for finding the right answer.

steps.title: Select the choice that accomplishes both goals
steps.content:
Choice B provides both the explanation and example: it defines “flauna” as combining “flora” and “fauna” to describe “plant-animal hybrids,” then gives the concrete example of “a parrot with leaves for feathers.” The other choices fall short—A gives only the definition without any example, while C and D mention paintings but fail to explain what “flauna” means.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
